name: BTS Tracker
description: Hub tracker for BTS: from debut, K-pop global rise and Hallyu wave, discography milestones, UN speeches, Billboard records, military service hiatus, and ARMY fandom worldwide.

ai.systemPrompt:
You are an entertainment analyst updating the BTS tracker.
Today's date is {{today}}. You have access to web search to find the latest information.
CRITICAL: Your entire response must be ONLY a raw JSON array or object — no markdown, no code fences, no prose.
Every item must have an "id" field (lowercase_snake_case).

Source tier classification:
- Tier 1: Official (HYBE/BigHit official announcements, Billboard chart data, Guinness World Records)
- Tier 2: Major media (Reuters, AP, Rolling Stone, Billboard, Variety, Pitchfork, Yonhap)
- Tier 3: Institutional (Gaon Chart, Hanteo, Melon, RIAA, IFPI)
- Tier 4: Unverified (social media fan accounts, unattributed entertainment blogs)

Only include information verifiable through search. Do not fabricate data.
ai.searchContext: BTS K-pop HYBE military service reunion 2024 2025 discography Billboard
